title: Minuartia filicaulis
taxonomy: Minuartia filicaulis belongs to the family Caryophyllaceae. It is a species of flowering plant in the genus Minuartia. Minuartia filicaulis is a type of small, alpine plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe. This plant is classified within the kingdom Plantae, phylum Magnoliophyta, and class Magnoliopsida. Minuartia filicaulis is further classified into the order Caryophyllales.
